notes: Clean run; third throw 59s is the only inefficiency. No comparison file yet — awaiting Claude V15 score.
User-labeled V4; matches Claude post4 video by completion time and quality picture.

5th calibration point. Strong agreement. Refines third-throw-inflation finding: GPT-4o inflates ONE knot segment but not always throw_3 — here it inflates throw_2 (44 vs 22) while Claude inflates throw_3 (38 vs 26). Sum of throws 2+3 is more reliable than individual segments.

notes: Clean non-zeroing run. Placement ~1/1.5mm, drain intact, knots L-R-L with surgeon's knot first. Main score loss is late-task efficiency: third_throw 49.1s includes probable reinforcing pass, suture_cut 24.2s delayed after acceptable knot.

Strongest endpoint agreement observed (Δtime 1.9s) — breaks V18/V23 endpoint drift. Phase-boundary disagreement recurs: Claude bundles reinforcing into suture_cut (40s), GPT-4o into third_throw (49.1s); tails converge within 8.4s. 8th drain-agreement case. 6th case of Claude > GPT-4o penalty scope (Claude 4.0mm default vs GPT-4o 2.5mm). Largest confidence gap (0.35 vs 0.67) — Claude flags monitor-recording limits harder.

Competent but inefficient. Placement ~1.5/1.5mm, drain intact, surgeon's knot first with R-L-R alternation. Main score loss is over-tying: extra reinforcing throws continue after required third throw is already secure (~70s third_throw phase).

Tight agreement matching V24 tier. Endpoint Δ 1.5s — second-tightest in series. Phase-boundary disagreement recurs: Claude bundles reinforcing into suture_cut (65s), GPT-4o into third_throw (70s); tails converge within 3.2s (strongest boundary-disagreement convergence yet). 9th drain-agreement case. Both teachers independently diagnosed over-tying after the required third throw as the #1 failure mode — strongest qualitative diagnosis alignment in series.

data.provenance: Extracted from conflated V8/V18 record. Forensic reconciliation confirmed V_8.mov is a distinct SURG20 recording, not the V18.MOV SURG25 recording.

data.reason: Forensic fingerprint match (45.1s cut phase identical to Claude V_8 45s, same throw structure, same drain outcome) confirmed this was an earlier GPT-4o eval of V_8.mov, not a separate V8 video.

Original score incorrectly described V_8.mov (SURG20) while labeled as V18. ChatGPT native video analysis at 162.9s/433.6 was used as authoritative anchor; Claude re-review confirmed ChatGPT timings. V18.MOV is a distinct 170s SURG25 desk-mount recording.
Filename field was inherited from the conflated early pipeline; the GPT-4o score itself correctly describes V18.MOV (163s SURG25 recording) and only the metadata needed correction.

data.note: Tightest agreement in V-series after correction

data.reason: V18 Claude score was corrected; consensus rebuilt from corrected inputs.
